title: Skip test if FreeType is not available
author: radarhere
body:
#9483 removed `@skip_unless_feature_version("freetype2", "2.12.0")` from a test, but if you look at https://github.com/python-pillow/Pillow/commit/6ab139eaabf441fc904b95aa86defa679ef33d31#diff-eefa1cdb86316aefaebe9171a7b6ff23dc6cf985baf21d91fa1586d86b911f23, you will see that before requiring a specific FreeType version, the test still required FreeType.

Indeed, if I run the test suite [without FreeType installed](https://github.com/radarhere/Pillow/actions/runs/23995420625/job/69982565896#step:13:40), the test fails - https://github.com/radarhere/Pillow/actions/runs/23995420625/job/69982565896#step:13:2915

So this PR updates the test to require FreeType again.
